title: Functional Aether
description: Add Functional Storage Drawers made from Aether(and Aether Addons) wood types.
body:
Functional Aether is a functional storage addon add drawers made from Aether(and Aether Addons) wood types.

Functional Aether support the following aether addons:
- aether gravitation
- ancient aether
- aether redux
- deep aether

Requires Functional Storage and The Aether.
